p.style: border: maroon 1px solid; background-color: #FFCCCC; font-weight: bold; padding: 8px

div.p: This value set cannot be expanded because of the way it is defined - it has an infinite number of members

p.style: border: black 1px dotted; background-color: #EEEEEE; padding: 8px; margin-bottom: 8px

div.p: Expansion based on codesystem Radiotherapy Prescription Energy Example v1.0.0 (CodeSystem)
